Silver, Alchemical: A complex process involving metallurgy and alchemy can bond silver to a weapon made of steel so that it bypasses the damage reduction of creatures such as lycanthropes.
On a successful attack with a silvered weapon, the wielder takes a -1 penalty on the damage roll (with the usual minimum of 1 point of damage). The alchemical silvering process can't be applied to nonmetal items, and it doesn'
t work on rare metals such as adamantine, cold iron, and mithral.
Alchemical silver has 10 hit points per inch of thickness and hardness 8.
Type of Alchemical Silver Item | Item Cost Modifier
|
Ammunition | +2 gp |
Light weapon | +20 gp |
One-handed weapon, or one head of a double weapon
| +90 gp |
Two-handed weapon, or both heads of a double weapon | +180 gp |
